data.title: South Carolina students and educators promote school choice during National School Choice Week, 420 schools participating.

data.title: Idaho joins National School Choice Week, with over 250 schools participating to help parents find the right K-12 schools.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in Idaho and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting the most suitable K-12 schools for their kids. Over 250 schools and organizations in the Gem State are participating in this initiative, which offers resources and support to families navigating educational options. The event spans various locations and is centered around facilitating informed decisions regarding school selection during this crucial period in a child's academic journey.

data.title: Michigan celebrates National School Choice Week with over 810 schools hosting open houses to help parents find the right K-12 schools.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in Michigan and nationwide, dedicated to assisting parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their children. Over 810 schools in Michigan are participating by organizing open houses, engaging families in making informed decisions about their children's education. This initiative aims to empower parents with the opportunity to explore diverse educational options to suit their child's needs.

data.title: School Choice Week begins in West Virginia with over 210 schools joining to help parents find the right K-12 schools.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in West Virginia and nationwide, aimed at aiding parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their kids. Over 210 schools and organizations in the Mountain State are participating in the event.

data.title: Nebraska students and educators participate in School Choice Week with over 150 schools involved in helping parents find K-12 schools for their children.

Over 150 schools and organizations in Nebraska are participating in this event, offering information and resources to parents to aid them in making informed decisions for their children's education.

data.description: Today marks the start of National School Choice Week in North Dakota and nationwide, with a primary aim of aiding parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their kids. Over 40 schools and organizations in the Peace Garden State are participating in this important initiative.

data.title: Coinone in South Korea considers selling stakes amid rumors of Coinbase interest, with major shareholders involved.
data.description: Coinone, a South Korean cryptocurrency exchange, has allegedly started selling off large portions of their ownership stakes. There are rumors circulating that the popular exchange Coinbase is considering making a strategic investment in Coinone.

data.title: Coinone, a South Korean crypto exchange, is seeking buyers for major shareholder stakes amid interest from Coinbase.
data.description: Coinone, a South Korean cryptocurrency exchange, has initiated the sale of its major shareholder stakes. Reports suggest that Coinbase is considering a strategic investment in the exchange. This move is generating significant interest in the market as these developments could potentially reshape the landscape of the cryptocurrency industry. It signifies a key strategic shift for Coinone and has sparked discussions among industry experts regarding the implications of such a move. This news has caused a stir within the crypto community, with the exact numbers and details of the transaction yet to be disclosed.Observers are closely monitoring the situation to see how this development will unfold in the coming days.

data.title: Swedish crypto asset manager, Virtune AB (Publ), launches new ETP, Virtune BNB on Nasdaq Stockholm.
data.description: On January 26th, 2026, Virtune, a regulated crypto asset manager based in Sweden, revealed the introduction of a novel crypto Exchange-Traded Product (ETP) named Virtune BNB ETP. This new offering will be available on Nasdaq Stockholm, the primary stock exchange in the Nordic region. Nasdaq Stockholm is renowned as the largest stock market in the Nordic countries.

data.title: Japan endeavors to enable crypto ETFs by 2028 as regulators mull rule changes for retail access to digital assets.
data.description: The financial regulatory body in Japan is considering making changes to rules that would enable cryptocurrency assets to be eligible for inclusion in Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs). This move indicates a potential change in retail investors' access to this market.

data.title: UROVO introduces DT630 Enterprise-grade Smartphone Terminal at NRF 2026, focusing on Logistics, Retail, Healthcare.
data.description: In Singapore on January 26, 2026, UROVO Technology, a top provider of industry application solutions, unveiled the DT630 Enterprise-grade Smartphone Terminal at NRF 2026. This innovative device is tailored to meet the evolving requirements of Logistics, Retail, and Healthcare industries, showcasing UROVO's commitment to cutting-edge technology.
